notes:
- Fixed dial readouts: every value now shows exactly 2 decimals with the unit once (e.g. "20.00 ms", "0.00 dB"), and the ratio reads correctly as "2.00:1" — replacing the 1.0.1 "20 ms ms" / "2: 1: 1" mangling.
- Standalone control bar now visible: BYPASS, UNDO, REDO and CHECK FOR UPDATES chips show in the editor header next to PRESETS/SAVE on every DT plugin (they were laid out with zero bounds in 1.0.1).
- Master Bypass — a real host bypass parameter plus the BYPASS toggle; bypassed audio passes through dry.
- Undo / Redo — backed by a per-effect undo history so parameter tweaks are reversible.
- Check for Updates — on-demand update check (CHECK), alongside the existing automatic on-launch check.
- Safer self-update: the macOS in-app updater stages, verifies and atomically swaps each bundle with rollback, so an interrupted update can't leave a broken plugin.
